```{r Validation rule 1: patient without enrolment}
problems <- problems |>
  dplyr::bind_rows(
    data$patients |>
      dplyr::anti_join(
        data$enrollments,
        dplyr::join_by("patient_key")) |>
      dplyr::anti_join(
        exceptions |> dplyr::filter(.data$rule_id == 1L),
        dplyr::join_by("patient_key")) |>
      dplyr::mutate(
        rule_id        = 1L,
        patient_key    = .data$patient_key,
        enrollment_key = NA_integer_,
        event_key      = NA_integer_,
        context        = list(list()),
        .keep = "none"))
```
